capabilities_used.evidence: 他反复把 ETF 资金流当成 BTC 方向催化剂来讲。例：2024-02-28 写“$BTC It wont stop going up until they stop buying half of the monthly emission every day.”；2024-04-29 又写“ETF flows stagnant since March, halting upward trend.”；2026-04-11 转发“BITCOIN ETFS SEE $786 MILLION INFLOWS”。
他会明确讲止损并接受被打掉。2026-04-10 关于 TAO： “Elimdeki poz stop oldu... 243 altı stoplarım”，说明他有清晰失效位，不恋战。
面对瀑布行情偏向等确认而不是硬接。2026-04-10 说“$TAO is nuking. Any news?!”；同日又说“Ill buy $TAO it if the trend shifts but for now it still looks terrible”；图 2 直接把 TAO 的 5 分钟暴跌框成 -17.26% 的测量区，明显是把这种走势视作危险段。
他非常重视下降趋势中的 lower highs / rejection。图 3 把 BTC 画成下降通道，连续标注“$126k rejection / $97k rejection / $73k rejection”，并给出更低支撑。2026-04-10 更直接说“$BTC is now preparing for another dump to $45k next week.”
当趋势翻多时他会顺势持有。2025-10-03 回复“weekly buy since May”；2024-12-06 写“120k soon... $BTC is going much higher and much faster than we think”；多条 1D/2D UCTS Buy 推文都是趋势转多后的跟随。

他经常用区间、reclaim、上下沿来做方向判断。2024-05-01 写“Breaking out of the range... If this bearish trend helds (not reclaiming the range), then aiming toward 52k seems not that crazy”；2024-04-29 也写“now fluctuating within upper and lower ranges”。图 7 同样是标准箱体支撑阻力框架。
他明确使用 bull trap / 假突破叙事。2026-04-10 说“$BTC just followed this chart into a $73K bull trap.”；图 3 也是在下降通道上沿附近标出 rejection，符合假突破失败后回落的处理方式。
他会用 RSI 背离做大级别反转依据。2026-04-11 写“$QNT... A confirmed BULLISH DIVERGENCE ON THE MONTHLY TIMEFRAME!”；2024-08-21 写“$MATIC RSI on the weekly at bottom levels”。图 7 也专门保留了 RSI 面板。
他直接使用 spring 语言。2026-04-11 说“$XRP vs. $BTC is working on a spring on this almost 500 days long accumulation range. We will likely get a bounce from the 0.618 fib...”，这基本就是威科夫吸筹 + spring。
虽然他不常用 ICT 术语，但图像表达明显偏向‘前支撑失守后变阻力’。图 3 的多个水平位先作为支撑，后续在反弹中变成 rejection；图 7 的 260.22 / 302.35 一带也是标准的支撑阻力翻转观察。
他并不只追突破，也会强调等回踩。2026-04-11 写“Hype obvious play... Ofc some of ts are already up, so bidding pullbacks might be better”；这说明他倾向在方向明确后等回调接续。
他会把 BTC 放到减半周期叙事里看。2024-04-20 发“Happy Halving $BTC”；图 5 是 BTC 月线级别的长期节奏图，和他频繁做 monthly/weekly 框架一致。

他偶尔会做 BTC 到山寨的轮动判断。2026-04-11 说“While $BTC made a lower low... ETH held the line... the next rally could be led by #ETH and quality alts”；2026-04-10 又说“je vois pas pourquoi on aurait pas une altseason”。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: UCTS Multi-Timeframe Alignment
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Uses the proprietary UCTS indicator across 1D, 2D, weekly, and monthly charts, and upgrades conviction when multiple timeframes flash buy or sell in the same direction.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 使用 UCTS 专有指标在 1D、2D、周线、月线多周期上寻找同向买卖信号；当多个周期共振时显著提高交易确信度。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2024-07-15 “$BTC Flashing a 1D UCTS Buy signal”；2024-07-17 “1D Buy confirmed, 2D UCTS Buy Flashing”；2024-06-24 “UCTS signalled the sell on the 1D and 2D way before the drop”；图 5 月线也直接显示 UCTS Buy/Sell 标签。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Synchronized Alt Down-Channel Breakout
new_capabilities_proposed.name_zh: 山寨同步下降通道突破
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Tracks multiple altcoins forming similar descending channels and treats broad simultaneous breakouts as a regime shift signal rather than isolated coin-specific moves.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 跟踪多个山寨币相似的下降通道结构，把大范围同步上破视为市场风格切换，而不是单币偶发走势。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2024-08-20 写“Many alts, repeating the same pattern, are attempting to break out from their downward channels”；2024-08-22 又说“most setups mirror each other”。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Range Reclaim Targeting
new_capabilities_proposed.name_zh: 区间收复后看对侧边界
new_capabilities_proposed.description: When price loses a major range and fails to reclaim, target the opposite side; when price reclaims the range, invalidate bearish continuation and rotate targets upward.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 价格跌破关键区间后若不能快速收复，则以区间另一端为目标；若成功收复，则否定空头延续并重新上修目标。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2024-05-01 “If this bearish trend helds (not reclaiming the range), then aiming toward 52k seems not that crazy”；2024-04-29 也以 BTC 上下区间为核心框架。

personal_quirks.quote: Macro and liquidity drive crypto. That's it.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 上层信念是宏观流动性决定大方向，单一叙事和局部消息不应凌驾于总流动性框架之上。

personal_quirks.quote: It wont stop going up until they stop buying half of the monthly emission every day.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 把供需失衡尤其是 ETF 持续吸收现货供给，当作趋势延续的核心理由。

personal_quirks.quote: Ill buy $TAO it if the trend shifts but for now it still looks terrible
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 不因叙事或信仰逆势接飞刀，先等趋势切换再考虑参与。

personal_quirks.quote: Elimdeki poz stop oldu şu an önemli bi bölgede olduğu içim bi tur daha denedim. 243 altı stoplarım
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 止损被触发就认错，若关键位仍有效可以重试，但必须重新定义失效位。

personal_quirks.quote: Mm, trusting the system 🤷‍♂️ UCTS signalled the sell on the 1D and 2D way before the drop.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 高度依赖自己的指标系统，并把多周期先行信号当成交易执行锚点。

unique_traits: 他不像纯价格行为派那样只画线，也不像纯宏观派那样只讲流动性；他的核心是把专有指标 UCTS、多周期趋势框架、区间/通道结构和 ETF 流量叙事拼在一起。与很多 TA 账号不同，他明显会做‘同构结构批量扫描’，经常说很多山寨在重复同一模式。另一方面，他又带有明显的内容创作者属性，喜欢用高确定性的口吻输出大方向和可传播结论。

high_conviction_phrases: just followed this chart into a $73K bull trap
low_conviction_phrases: trying to maintain a neutral stance
let see how it goes from here
